appointmentDate.title: Appointment Date
appointmentDate.description: The date of the requested service appointment.

appointmentTopic.title: Appointment Topic
appointmentTopic.description: The subject of the service appointment.

serviceTerritory.title: Service Territory
serviceTerritory.description: The branch name or the appointment's zip/postal code

serviceResources.title: Service Resources
serviceResources.description: The staff members at the branch where the appointment is scheduled. If the customer doesn’t specify staff member names, the appointment is scheduled with any available staff members.

earliestStartTime.title: Preferred Earliest Start Time
earliestStartTime.description: Don't prompt the user for this attribute. Specifies the earliest time after which the system begins to look for available appointment slots on a given date. The time must be provided in the HH:MM format (24-hour clock), without any time zone or additional timestamp information. If no time of day is provided, the default value is null.

appointmentChannel.title: Appointment Channel
appointmentChannel.description: Channel of the appointment getting booked.

isGroupAppointment.title: Group Appointment
isGroupAppointment.description: Indicates whether the user wants to schedule a group service appointment. The default value is 'false'. If the user wants to schedule a group appointment, set this to 'true'. This field should not be prompted by the system; the value will be set based on the user's intent and should not require further user input.

caseNumber.title: Case Number
caseNumber.description: The case number to associate with the appointment.
